review_text: Bulli Caravan Park is a great place to stay with fantastic views but dont stay there when it rains. A number of sites turn to mud when it rains. They fail to raise the campsites that are muddy and either put down a green mat or concrete. Otherwise a nice place to camp!

Arrived with our motorhome and the reception staff were friendly and helpful. Unfortunately when we got to our site it was to find was a bit of a mud pool - not Bulli tourist park’s fault as it had been raining but a bit perturbing. Then prior to 06:00 restaurant staff arrived at work- banging of car doors , loud talking and music ??…at 6:08 a rubbish removal truck arrived to remove waste … goodness gracious folks we are on holiday not boot camp show some consideration
Needs Block to be refurbished to 2000?
nice clean tourist park
Great spot right on beach

Bulli caravan park is our second home, we love the  location, cleanliness, service and caravan park overall. We stay in camping site with a caravan. Deric (park manager) was such a gentlemen when dealing with us upon requesting a certain spot we love staying on he happily moved us with no issues and was so lovely to deal with. The ladies at front desk also amazing customer service… this park will not disappoint and worth staying at. We will back back soon again.
Wouldn't recommend it... filthy shower block and no Wi-Fi. Planned on staying two nights but couldn't get out of there quick enough after one night.. with no refund of second night

The location is simply spectacular. Beach, ocean pools, long beach path for walking, cafe, all right at the park. Great grass for camping.  Two toilet blocks to choose from. Staff bend over backwards to help. Brewery a must but also the cactus shop with art gallery and cafe all in one. Might as well drive to the Scarborough hotel too and then the sea cliff bridge. Honestly, a top location. Oh and quiet neighbors .... Oohhh haha

Powered site, very neat park!
Amenities are a bit dated, but clean. Fantastic location!
We had a motorhome site in this caravan park. Location, amenities and service were all great. Prices were reasonable.

Cannot beat the location of this tourist park. Never had such a friendly and informative experience at a caravan park check in. Powered site was $55/night, large and grassy. Ammenities were modern and clean. Definitely will be staying here again. The cafe onsite is a great addition

This place and location is very underrated. Staff are very friendly and the amenities block was very clean. Only thing I'd suggest is another dump point at the top amenities block. The solar security lights need attention too as they didn't operate while we were there or were switched off???

There's a great walking/cycling path next door just watch out for the kids on the electric bikes.

We will come back again.
Ein wunderschöner Ort, direkt am Meer. Sehr freundliche Dame am Empfang, gute und saubere sanitäre Anlagen. Wir fühlten uns sehr wohl und können diesen Platz nur empfehlen.
Good camp for caravan stays
Great place

Very good
Great location
Great place to relax
Room very tired, could do with an freshen up
This looks like a great place to stay
Schöner Wohnmobilstellplatz mit Rasenplätzen zwischen Friedhof und Meer. Die Sanitäranlagen sind etwas in die Jahre gekommen aber sauber. Absolut super ist der direkte Zugang zum Strand!!
Beautiful spot to camp, nice cafe and the rock pool is awesome
Good value campsite with reasonable facilities. A couple of cafes within a short work. Sea swimming pool nearby

What a great location.
We have finally bought our  bikes with us and it great to go for a ride north or south along the coast line.
Great place....beach close....great amenities....only drawback was other inconsiderate campers who are pigs when it comes to using the amenities....not the parks fault! Beautiful spot❤️💚

Friendly helpful staff. Southern/top block toilets modern and clean. Ensuites sites also clean. Right on a great beach, close to re reational path and pool. Good food and coffee at Cafe adjacent to park. Playgrounds also close.
Bulli Beach Bunny
Not a 5-star hotel. BUT this is a 5/5 place for me! Location is so perfect! Spacious rooms, and you got your essentials. Staffs are great too. Would come back again!!!
Me and my partner had a great stay at the holiday park great facilities very clean and comfortable very friendly helpful stay highly recommended for a few days away in Bulli great beachfront Cabin
Great spot and easy access to beach and shops
Viele Kakadus, Friedhof als Nachbar.
A great park for travellers.  Very clean and well organised.
Un camping bien aménagé avec de grands emplacements
Visited for the first time for my boss' birthday, awesome spot will definitely be back
Bicycle rides around the park are just world class.

Der Campground liegt direkt an der Düne, die zum schönen Strand führt.
Toll sind die Rockpools beidseitig,  die zum Schwimmen einladen und bei Flut mit frischem Meerwasser überspült werden.
Toiletten,  Waschräume und Campingküche sind sauber und einwandfrei. Die Plätze sind ausreichend groß und gut ausgestattet.
Der Preis ist sehr fair bezüglich der Leistungen.

Fantastic camping spot, clean large sites, great amenities and close to cafes. Beautiful beach amd two lovely swimming pools.
For a weekend get away this is perfect. Staff as super friendly and park is well maintained and quiet.
One of my favourite places to come and stay.
Beautiful view and the sea side pools are great
It's a great spot right next to the beach, with a cafe on the corner and a playground for the kids at the park and also just a short walk away.
Great spot, we get a cabin, if you can get one.
Excellent location and really well maintained park. We’ll definitely be back! ☀️
Ill be back. Awesome spot

Been here with my partner and granddaughter for a week so far and wish I didn't have to leave as it is such a beautiful place. I would 100% recommend this place to anyone travelling or just for a small get away. I can't fault this place at all.

We recently stayed the weekend for my wedding, the place had amazing views to take photos. Got to enjoy the perfect sunrise everyday even with the little guests around aka the rabbits and cockatoos, the cafe is wonderful for coffee and to have something to eat
Great spot just stopped for an overnight stop graveyard behind is a bit creepy but we didn’t get a site near there
Amazing beach access, just be prepared to be next to the cemetery.

Great for first time campers !

Community BBQ that's are very clean
Community bathroom very clean
Beach super close .
Woolworths 2 mins away .

You feel like your in the wild but it's super safe .

My partner was a first time camper and she loved it .

I would return

I recently stayed at Bulli for a weekend camping trip, and while the location is undeniably stunning, the overall experience left me with mixed feelings. I’m giving it 3 stars not because it was bad, but because a few key frustrations held it back from being great.

Let’s start with the good stuff. Bulli Beach itself is absolutely beautiful. Waking up to the sound of waves crashing just beyond the dunes is something special. The coastal walk is lovely, and it’s a great spot for early morning strolls or catching the sunrise with a cup of coffee in hand. The ocean breeze helps keep things cool, and there’s a nice balance of open space and shady areas.

Facilities are pretty decent, too. The amenities block was clean and well-maintained during our stay. Showers had good water pressure and stayed warm a must after a day at the beach. There’s a playground for kids, BBQ areas, and a café nearby if you’re not keen on cooking every meal yourself. The park staff were polite and checked us in quickly, though we didn’t see much of them after that.

Now for the not-so-great part: the tent setup. I don’t know what’s under the surface at Bulli, but trying to peg down the tent was a nightmare. Honestly, it was like hammering into cement. We bent several pegs trying to get them in, even after soaking the ground a bit. Eventually, we gave up and used rocks and sandbags to weigh the corners down. I’ve camped in a lot of places, but this was one of the most difficult setups I’ve dealt with. If you’re bringing a tent to Bulli, make sure you have heavy-duty stakes and a rubber mallet or be ready for a serious arm workout and a lot of swearing.

Another issue was how close the campsites are to each other. There’s not much in the way of privacy, and noise travels easily. We had a group next to us with kids, but be aware that it’s not exactly peaceful if you're hoping for quiet evenings under the stars.

Also worth noting: the ground doesn’t drain well if it rains. We had a brief shower overnight, and even with a ground tarp, our tent ended up with a few damp patches.

All that said, the location is hard to beat. If you’ve got a campervan or caravan, I imagine the experience would be much more comfortable. But for tent campers, it’s a bit of a challenge, especially if you’re not prepared for the unforgiving ground.

Final verdict: 3 stars. Bulli is beautiful, the beach is unbeatable, and the facilities are fine but unless they’ve added jackhammers to the gear hire, pegging your tent here is going to test your patience (and your pegs).

I stayed in a powered van spot. Lovely place right on the beach. Cafe, play equipment and plenty of grassed area.
Staff were lovely.
Amenities block was clean and tidy with a key code entry available from reception.
Stayed in the beach side cabins, beautiful listening to the waves

If I could give it more than five stars, I would.

This is my second time here and love it although not a fan of being next to the cemetery (at least our neighbours are dead quite) lol.

I have a caravan but opted to hire a cabin because the views and amenities are awesome. You get a bbq on your veranda with a long bench facing the beach. What more do you want? While people with caravans miss out on the views we get while having lunch or dinner.

Friendly staff and awesome for a weekend getaway.

Had a family get together about 20peope we had 5 cabins wich were perfect.clean practical n great location & we had 3 camp sites all were awsome they even had a big room/hall that we hired with fridges,microwaves, bbq,chairs n tables we all fitted in well awsome weekend at a great family friendly caravan park I definitely will b back only 1hour from blacktown
Stay literally on the beach, that's this park all about.

The park is lovely, situated right next to the ocean. Our ensuite site was clean and well-appointed, although perhaps a bin would have been a welcome addition. There is a great cafe on site, perfect for breakfast or a morning coffee. One can enjoy their coffee while strolling along the walking track that follows the ocean. For those feeling adventurous, an early morning swim in one of the rock pools could be a delightful experience. It serves as an excellent base for exploring the attractions and sights that the Wollongong area has to offer.
Robley helpers - attended here and completed a baby sitting service here. The cabins were well spread out and maintained, good amount of parking here as well.

Stayed for 2 nights in the 2 bed cabins and it was amazing! Our first family holiday ever and I'm so glad I picked this spot! The cabin was cozy and great! Easy to keep warm as the weather was a bit nippy at times!
Hearing the waves put us to sleep at night, people were friendly, and staff too!
There were bunnies!!!
Def's booking again!
Nice place very quiet and clean. Beach is 2mins away. Cafe in the complex. Rooms are air conditioned. Loved it.
Great spot for short walk to enjoy the beach

One of the best caravan parks I've stayed at. Amenities are clean park is clean and very friendly. Close to all facilities and right on the beach.
Beautiful spot.
Great location. Some cabins need a bit of TLC. Clean and tidy though.
great location - very friendly staff - comfortable cabins
Powered caravan site. Great park. Friendly staff. Clean ameneties.
2 night stay on powered site. Friendly staff, clean amenities,  beautifully cared for park and a very short walk to the beach. The area has well maintained walking paths.

I had to double check that it is indeed 2025, and yet still this park continues to lack Wi-Fi access for guests. This absence of a fundamental amenity is particularly surprising given that the nightly rates for cabins are comparable to those of full-service hotels. The expectation for modern connectivity, especially when paying premium prices, remains unmet.
Good caravan sites, get the grass ones on the back row, really quite plus good wind breaks that reduvtbe wind impact in the afternoon
The location is fabulous. A nice Cafe in the park. The cabin we stayed in was ok except dirty in places and the toilet was tiny with no exhaust fa
Lovely staff, great spot to access the 2 rock pools, beach and walk.
Beautiful beach

One of my worst experiences this is my fifth time here and I always just come to see the beach every morning but nothing else. This time was too much though there was sand on four of the beds and there was a shirt behind the mattress that smell like sweat and I felt really sick🤢🤢. The other thing is all the couches was really stinky and wet. There wasn’t a first aid kit I cut myself and I didn’t find a first aid kit, how is this even allowed!!! Plus the lady at the reception was really rude and she made my daughter really scared with the way she was talking to me and how she was saying that she would kick me out of the cabinet if I get six people in the cabinet instead of five!!! Like hellooo???? All the beds and floors LITERALLY stink. I would never recommend.
Nice clean park 100 metres from the beach. Toilets and hot showers. There is a play area for the kids. Drive through bays available. The rock pool is a short walk from the park.

Loved this place , I did find the one bedroom cabin small and couldn't watch TV as it was way above the fridge. Will definitely get a two bedroom next time and with the amazing ocean view.

Beware with the cabins further away from the ocean are actually next to a cemetery, and it's very, very close . Basically a couple of metres away. I'm surprised that it's actually aloud to be that close.

Nice Park close to amenities, beach & kiosks. Tidal pools within walking distance. Old toilets are dated but relatively clean. New toilets much nicer. Sites are hard to access for large vans & where we were the site was very uneven.  Driveways are tiny so fair bit of manoeuvring required. Otherwise a nice stay. Would come again.
Campground is close to the beach, but it didn’t have WiFi, which was surprisingly because it was fairly expensive for a place with so few amenities.
What a great find will definitely be back great spot
2 night stay in a motor home.  Excellent staff, all amenities spotless, and great spot on the beach
Great staff. They were fully booked but helped us out. Give them a call.
location Great view from the cabins just superb great park

Pre booked powered site, 2 adults. 2 night stay in March. We had site 34, grassed and facing the inbound park road. We have a 14 foot van so fitted straight on the site, most vans had to reverse in on an angle as the sites are generous in width but narrow in depth. It would be helpful to some guests if this was advised at check in as we had an enormous Winnebago back in on the site behind and as they didn’t fit just kept reversing onto our patch and close to the side of our van until they did fit.  Their children then just used all space including ours nearby to run, yell and be a nuisance.
There are two amenities blocks, the one at the front of the park is ancient, not well maintained and has a weird tile like floor with dirt trapped in between, the windows and entry door are filthy, the  new one at the top of the hill was much cleaner. Access to amenities, laundry and camp kitchen are all locked with a code required. Coded gates for entry and exit.
Beach access is close with tracks from the walking path, sites and surrounds of the park are well maintained.

Had caravan site. Fitted us in after mix up on my behalf. Good size grass sites but had to set up at an angle as our 8m van was too big. Perfect location. Security at night due to recent incident beyond parks control.
We had a lovely stay in our caravan on an ensuite site.

Great location but the lack of security is awful.  Camp kitchen needs more equipment, as well as cameras and fencing,  the public bike path is accessible to anyone to enter the park!! There were some dodgy looking characters and I did not feel safe at all.  I was a female on my own.  As well as all my food in the camp fridge stolen.  Certainly left a bitter taste, and I am booked to go again but now fear it maybe not safe.  Also no wifi for guests!
Great park right on the beach
Great location. Clean, comfortable cabin. T.V, Air con in every room, gas BBQ good kitchen.👍👍👍👍☀️2 beach pools near by ++++

It's a great park right on the beach. Surf club a few minutes walk for good food and coffee. Unfortunately on my most recent stay had 3 people enter the park on mopeds and steal a dirtbike from the back of a ute parked across from my tent site. A knife was pulled on the owner who awoke to it all at 2.30am! I had my young Daughter with me and obviously this was not a pleasant experience.

I had a one-bedroom cabin for 4 nights. Absolute bliss! Meters from the patrolled beach, an ocean pool and a walkway to Wollongong along the shore. Grounds were immaculate. My cabin clean and neat. Only unfortunate thing was the closure of the onsite kiosk/cafe. I did not want to leave. I am planning to quietly celebrate my birthday here with family later in the year.

Leider müssen wir feststellen, daß dieser einer der schlechtesten war die wir kennengelernt haben. Wir haben bestimmt schon 80 Campingplätze gehabt. Die erste Zeit haben wir in Cabinen geschlafen, seit 2023 sind wir mit unseren Caravan unterwegs. |Ein Friedhof ist in jeder Stadt, das ist nicht der Punkt, aber muss er offen sichtbar für mich als Camper sein? Nein, ein bisschen Bewuchs hätte gereicht, wie kann man nur so gleichgültig sein? Die Nacht für den Stellplatz 90 Dollar ist ordentlich, da kann ich als Gast einiges erwarten. Für das Geld kein freies WIFI ? Warum nicht? Die Sanitäranlagen waren allerdings der absolute Hit. Die Duschköfe stammen aus welcher Zeit? Glück gehabt, bisschen Wasser kommt schon. Die Sauberkeit war absolut grenzwertig. Die Stellplätze sind für große Caravans ungeeignet, kein Platz.|Etwas schönes - der Strand! Allerdings können sie dafür nichts.  Von uns keine Weiterempfehlung. Schade, es war sehr enttäuschend.
Great place for a break, close to the beach, a pool both ends of the beach which are great for young kids
Great spot but very tight.

Great location clean tidy bathrooms
All important dump point 😟 rock swimming pools were great. Lovely coffee shop overlooking the beach.
Great location. Friendly staff.
Great location.  Had enough room on our caravan site, just had to have the caravan (19.6) on an angle on the site.

100m to the water. Good views of the ocean from different spots.
Clean ammenities and grounds in the park.
Friendly locals roam the grounds too, of the furry kind.

Wonderful spot. Cabins clean. Staff helpful
Had a lovely stay.

We had a nice motorhome sites with view to the ocean.
Everything was nice.

Campground mit direktem Zugang zum Meer. Ruhige Lage, da z.T. an den Friedhof grenzend. Die Anlage selbst ist etwas in die Jahre gekommen. Leider scheint auch das Thema Reinigung der Sanitäranlagen etwas unter die Räder gekommen zu sein. Die Bereitstellung von Besen oder Abzieher würde manchen vielleicht animieren seinen Dreck auch selbst zu entfernen.
Nette camping, toiletgebouw vlak bij receptie een beetje verouderd maar de andere ziet er netjes uit. Ligging ten opzichte van de zee is perfect.

A nice relaxing spot, the sound of the waves, kids having fun, and at an affordable rate.. some things could be better, but that's life!!  we used to escape reality via the internet life was better, now we escape the internet with places like this 🫶

Nice big, clean caravan park.
We got a powered site with an ensuite. ( pictures included). It was so nice having our own bathroom, and the rates were reasonable.
It's right on the beach and also a great walking/ biking path that goes for miles and miles all along the coast.
Lots of birdlife and bunnies!
Only stayed one night but really enjoyed it. Cabins are new and very clean.
Nice location. Neighbours are quiet. Plenty of birds and rabbits to keep you company. Lower amenity block showers are woeful. Thankfully we found the top block which were better.

Great beach! The campsite is right next to the beach, perfect location for us, using a powered camper site. Good toilets and showers. We didn't use the kitchen, and only stayed one night. Everything worked. The amenities blocks are accessible by a code so not usable by the general public. Easy to book by phone and late arrival wasn't a problem.

So much fun for the hole family young and old.
So cool 😎 bike tracks and rock pools.
Great park on the beach, walking/riding  track to Wollongong.
Right on the water; a holiday close to Sydney, an affordable price with the beach on your doorstep! Such a rare gem.
Council owned and subsequently poorly funded and managed

You see the reviews talking about people dying to get a permanent spot at this caravan park, but I didn't appreciate the unwavering commitment from its residents!
The above is a joke in relation to the cemetery next door.
Bulli Beach Tourist Park is actually a beautiful and spacial place.

Pretty disappointed

Stayed in a cabin.

Holes in flyacreens
No lockable bathroom door, broken bathroom door
Dirty plates
No batteries in TV remotes
No WiFi
And reception doesn't answer phones.

Fathers day weekend away. Pretty unfortunate.
Great little cabin near the coast cycleway. Sparkling clean with all the basics.
Perfect lication

Advised to take a 2 bedroom cabin although only one couple for benefit of ocean view - unfortunately too cold and windy to sit on verandah and lounges and window inside too low to see sea, unless standing. |All clean and tidy inside with good aircon. Everything very basic though with no hangers in wardrobe, one spare blanket for 5  beds, minimal toiletries, few coffee etc sachets, no salt/pepper, no spare pillows. WORST of all, especially considering cost,. NO WI-FI.|Surprised to see police outside kitchen window early morning - apparently in response to breaking from many fast moving bikers on path alongside.

We stayed at a powered site. We didn't see a staff member the whole time we stayed 6 days. And in the most hectic winds. Not busy this time of year.
Beautiful spot right on the beach, the cafe in the park is amazing.
I would have liked to have been told the amenities block left of the site had been renovated. We used the older ones closer to our site and my husband was too tall for the shower head  😞.
Loved the native  birds and the beach being so close. Has no problem with it being on the edge of the cemetery. Top spot ...in summer it must be just amazing.
Can't beat this park. Best location with Ruby's coffee shop on site
Fantastic area and the cabins were great

The rooms were clean and warm.
It was close to cafe's and restaurants.
The park was dog friendly and clean.
I'd like to go there again in summer..
Great coffee an dogs welcome inside an outdoor seating,prices reasonable great views.

We requested a certain Ensuite site when booking (mainly due to the theft and poor security at the park) and had that particular site confirmed as booked and paid for via email. Three weeks later received a call saying our booking had been cancelled as all ensuite sites have been taken off line for the period we had booked, so we booked a powered site. On arrival 6 weeks later we checked if any ensuite sites were available but were told no ensuites are available as all were offline due to re turfing and upgrade. Set up our site and a couple of hours later a caravan set up on the site we had originally booked. Staff/Management in the office advised they had the right to do that even though we had a written booking confirmation for that site. We were repeat customers to the Bulli Tourist park and this has left us questioning whether we should go to this park again or not. The park itself is quite good however the actions taken by the management regarding our booking were not conducive to enticing customers to booking any future stays at the park.
Great food at an excellent price. Staff excellent.
overnight stay just what we wanted
Nice caravan park & appreciated the Seniors discount

We had a great time with all our family  will tell friends about it so hope you get more of our friends going to Bulli Beach Tourist Park
The McRae Family Tuena
Personal and family fave for a place to chillax in a stunning location

Great location right on the beach. Clean and well maintained. Staff were very helpful. Caravan sites are raised about 10mm from the road way making it tricky to unhitch the car if the back tires aren’t able to be up on the grass. Quiet and peaceful with lots of wildlife. Two shower blocks - the far on up the hill is modern and recommended. Two cafes nearby (one on site) open from breakfast to after lunch). We will be back!

Nice camp directly opposite Bulli beach which is very nice. Pitches up the top end are nice and can drive through if nobody else is there. Very tricky if other pitches are full as no space up front 🙈. Facilities clean but Dump point is opposite kids play area which is not good.
Great caravan park right on the beach. Amenities dated but clean.

Great tourist park, on the beach.
Friendly staff.
Close to shops.

A great caravan park on absolute beach front!  An ocean pool to the left and ocean pool to the right, plus many kilometres of bike and walking trails. Park itself has many cabins which are mostly beach frontage and very well maintained. Caravan sites are plentiful and amenities are well maintained. Prices this time of year (March) are probably the cheapest I have paid on the ocean. |I definitely recommend this park and give it a 10.

Stayed at this place for 2 nights, fantastic location 5 second walk from the beach that was clean and perfect in every way, I will be enjoying myself here for the on coming future, I highly recommend this place.
Gorgeous location, cabins are very spacious. Looking forward to visiting this park again soon.
Everything about this accomadation is great.you wont regret it. Great for family and   not too hard on your wallet.💙

Great park, friendly staff, clean amenities, a few cute little rabbits getting around, cycle path right beside park if you're into fitness it's the perfect walk or run or ride :) |The beach is beautiful and has lifeguards on duty, water was 23°
Great place to visit. The beach is clean, and the water is crystal clear. The surf is a bit rough, but life savers are always around. Beautiful surroundings and wildlife.
We booked our van in for family - they had a great stay!

Great park good size sites, clean facilities, has small camp kitchen that you can cook in with microwave, hot plate toaster and kettle with bbq outside. Opposite the bulli beach , cafe just outside cabins as well if you are not a camper.|Friendly park have stayed a few times here.

I'm writing this review because apparently sharing it with the front desk is an exercise it complete futility.

The ladies toilets are currently revolting, uncleaned and have dirty water bubbling up through the sinks. The park boss is no where to be seen and the cleaners have left and everything seems.to be too hard to fix.

Seriously it seems like little more then hosing, mowing and charging are all the jobs they do here.

Servicepersonal:
Außerordenktlich hilfsbereit und freundlich!!
5/5*

Anlage:
Es wirkte alles äußerst gepflegt.
Offensichtlich wird die Anlage auch immer wieder modernisiert. Alles funktionierte einwandfrei und war äußerst angenehm.
5/5*

Gäste:
Hier waren es mitunter die nettesten Nachbarn die wir je hatten. Einmal war meine Fahrzeugbatterie leer...
Es kamen direkt 4 Leute mit starthilfekabel und halfen meinen Wagen wieder in Gang zu bringen.
Sie gaben mir dann sogar ihre Telefonnummer, damit ich sie anrufen könne, falls ich irgendwo liegen bleibe.
Ein Traum!
5/5*

Beschäftigungsmöglichkeiten:
Es gibt relativ zentral ein großes Zelt, das fast Täglich mit verschiedenen Veranstaltungen belebt wird.
Bingo, Bastelkurse, spiele, gemeinsames Frühstücken und und und...
Das alles kostenfrei.
Zwei Gehminuten entfernt ist der sehr schöne Strand.
5/5*

Preis:
62,5 AU$  für eine Nacht (Powerded Site) für zwei Erwachsene und ein Kleinkind.
Ich fand es aufgrund der sehr sehr schönen anlage vollkommen Ok.

Fazit:
Es lohnt sich wirklich hier her zu Fahren. Es gibt keinen schöneren (mir bekannten) Campingplatz.
Einziges Manko: kein Wlan
5/5*
Camping with our Campervan was nice.

Fantastic place, got a 2 bedroom cabin and felt pretty spacious. Really good relaxed vibe. Had everything we needed, could have stayed their longer and also so close to the beach and woolies is just down the road if you need anything. Good cabin for the price. A place to do our laundry was accessible as well.
Clean, tidy. Nice food in the cafe.
Our powered site was great, ocean views an not too far from the facilities.
Bit hilly, generally ok  close to beach, stroll to Cafe. Good pensioner rate. Can get windy. Lots of bunnies. Dont feed iceburg  lettuce, not good for them.

Always enjoy staying here, wonderful spacious cabins, and also great facilities for camping both caravans andor tents. Beach is beautiful, and there's a great path to go for a walk. It is family friendly, although pets are only welcome if they are service animals. They have wheelchair accessible cabins available also. The staff are lovely and helpful. It is a great place for a break. Oh and the wild life get up close and personal, the lorikeets are very friendly, they will take food out of your hands, ( i recomend bringing a bit of fruit for them or some actual lori food as some human foods can be harmful). The cockatoos are cheeky and will get into anything left out in the open.
Nice place to stay 😊
Beautiful park. Beautiful beach. Sea Baths within walking distance. Friendly, helpful staff. Highly recommend.
Great place and location.  Big vans book ahead some on the sites are not very long and tight to get into.
Easy check in very friendly and helpfull staff clean sites children's play ground  nice experience
Great location and very good park. We could even see whales from our cabin
Love this place. Been coming here for years. Really nice staff, beautiful spot

Site: large sites, sloping a little where we were. Well kept with a lot of grass.

Location: fantastic spot in between everything north of Wollongong. Close to shops, cafe’s and so many beaches. Lots to do and see in Bulli and the surrounds.

Staff: fantastic, helpful, caring and easy to engage.

Showers: unfortunately, after spending currently 8 months in the van, these are the second worst we have experienced and was the only blight on the two weeks stayed. Pressure was terribly inconstant (most parks aren’t great but this was the worst from 18 parks we have stayed at this year), temperature capped (all hot, no cold and still wanting more even though no one else in the shower block) and the shower heads we so close to the walls that at my size, I’m touching the knobs. If they fixed these Bulli would be in my top 5 parks stayed at. Not a make or break if your staying a weekend. But for us travelling full time, the shower is one of the 4 things we judge our parks on. Hence, 4 stars.
Wonderfully close to the beach.
Stay in Caravan
Enjoyed it so much great spot and bike track and loved ruby cafe 👍
Great caravan park right on the beach. Clean, modern amenities. Well priced. Large powered sites. Kids playground and bikes for hire.

For guests with their own caravans, this place is excellent. However, we rented a 1-bedroom "cabin" which is just a glorified trailer. It is bare-bones accommodation. For $150/night, I expect a bit more comfort. The scenery was definitely beautiful. It is quiet and serene. I love the bunnies hopping around and the cockatoos visiting at my doorstep looking for a handout. There is a laundry if you need it at $4 for both washer & dryer, & a quaint coffeeshop. If you rent a cabin, be sure to bring everything that you need as if you are camping because they only supply the very basic: Veg peeler, spatula, can opener, 1 skillet, a colander, 2 saucepans, a water jug, and toaster. They supply linens & towels but bring your toiletries!
Great location for caravans and also cabins... clean... has a lovely Cafe there too.

Sensational park on the foreshore and close to everything easy walking.
We maintained and very clean credit to the staff and great welcome by front desk on arrival.
Thank you.
Loved it. 👍🇦🇺
Stayed at powered/ensuite camp site, great location to go a explore (sea cliff bridge/Wollongong) right off the beach, quite location.
Nice camp

Cabin filthy, cracked tiles in kitchen, cockroaches, dead bugs stuck on the walls with fly spray, uncomfortable bed, crockery dirty, kitchen drawers broken, lounge putrid, dusty.
Never again.
Amazing place to stay. Rosies is a hit for a feed aswell

Very clean park with modern amenities. Grounds kept in great condition, and no pets allowed was a nice change. (People always ignore their yapping or barking fur babies)  Great laundry facilities as well.
Right on the beach and cycle track, and walking distance to shops.
Couldn't ask for more😁
Great spot,  discount for seniors.  Clean amenities.  Friendly staff, easy check in.

Great place we stayed for a basketball tournament. Cabins are really nice! Unfortunately, no WiFi and Telstra signal was very poor.
So, download stuff for the kids in advance.
Right on the beach. Going for my wife's birthday in 2 weeks

We were a group of 12 going away to Bulli for three days of walks in the various parks so this park was an excellent choice for two cabins (nine of us), a caravan (two) and camp site (one).||Ours was a two-bedroom Deluxe Cabin for five people and it was excellent. In a lovely location slightly raised on a hill overlooking the beach and catching sun for most of the day.||We had a large queen bedroom, and three others shared the three-bed room (no bunks thankfully). All were comfortable with independent heating (needed) and TV sets (unused). There were a separate shower room and toilet so great for the five of us. There was also an amenities block within a short distance if required and this was very clean and well-maintained.||It was well equipped for all of with a large fridge and place and cutlery settings for five. Placemats would have been lovely as we worried about hot drinks on the wooden tables.|Whilst dishwashing liquid was provided it was in small sachets, and rather ineffective so a general bottle (maybe not permitted?) would have been more useful. Also, the tea-towels moved the moisture around rather than drying the dishes.||It should be noted that it is an approximate 20+mins walk to Woolworths and other amenities in the town.||Other than that, it was just perfect for our stay, and we would certainly stay here again.|
